columns.name: CUSTNO
columns.description: Unique customer identifier

columns.name: PNO
columns.description: Part number or product reference

columns.name: NM
columns.description: Name of the customer

columns.name: AD1
columns.description: First line of the address

columns.name: AD2
columns.description: Second line of the address

columns.name: AD3
columns.description: Third line of the address

columns.name: AD4
columns.description: Fourth line of the address

columns.name: PAREA
columns.description: Geographical or business area related to the part number

columns.name: CTRY
columns.description: Country code where the customer is located

columns.name: MAILAD
columns.description: Full mailing address of the customer

columns.name: PHONE
columns.description: Customer's phone number

columns.name: RSP
columns.description: Person or department responsible for the customer

columns.name: CUR
columns.description: Currency code of transactions with this customer

columns.name: INTRT
columns.description: Interest rate applicable to the customer

columns.name: GR1
columns.description: First level of grouping for this customer

columns.name: GR2
columns.description: Second level of grouping for this customer

columns.name: GR3
columns.description: Third level of grouping for this customer

columns.name: GR4
columns.description: Fourth level of grouping for this customer

columns.name: GR5
columns.description: Fifth level of grouping for this customer

columns.name: INF
columns.description: Additional information field 1

columns.name: INF2
columns.description: Additional information field 2

columns.name: INF3
columns.description: Additional information field 3

columns.name: INF4
columns.description: Additional information field 4

columns.name: INF5
columns.description: Additional information field 5

columns.name: INF6
columns.description: Additional information field 6

columns.name: NOTENM
columns.description: Name of the note or document related to this customer

columns.name: CHDT
columns.description: Date when changes were made to the record

columns.name: CHTM
columns.description: Type of change made to the record

columns.name: CHUSR
columns.description: Username or identifier of the user who made the changes

columns.name: LCKST
columns.description: Lock status indicating if the record is locked for updates

columns.name: CHPRC
columns.description: ID or reference to the change process that modified this record

columns.name: CHSM
columns.description: Sequence number for changes made to the record

columns.name: AGACNO
columns.description: Customer account number

columns.name: R6
columns.description: Sixth level of responsibility or grouping for this customer

columns.name: REMPRDT
columns.description: Date when the remittance was processed

columns.name: CUR2
columns.description: Second currency code for this customer
